title: Dry Bulk Market On A Firmer Footing
section_path: Dry Bulk Market On A Firmer Footing
section_path_text: Dry Bulk Market On A Firmer Footing
summary:
Main
By Eirini Diamantara & Dimitris Roumeliotis
The dry bulk market has entered 2026 on a markedly firmer footing, with the strong finish of 2025 and the solid opening weeks of the new year translating directly into higher asset values across all size segments. Freight momentum has not only restored confidence but has also pushed second-hand prices to levels that, in the case of Capesizes, have not been witnessed since the peak cycle of 2008. Quarterly averages from the Baltic timecharter data clearly illustrate the shift.
